edit_summary: Round-1 reviewer-b Major fixes: (1) acceptance-tests table restructured with a separate Doc Status metadata column and an explicit non-oracle note (AMBIGUITY); (2) TEST-002 gains sub-case (c) indented/bulleted field mention as the column-0 anchoring negative control, TEST-003 gains the final-line-without-trailing-newline byte-identity fixture (EDGE-CASE-COVERAGE); (3) new AC-005/TEST-005 gate-phase live==staged hash evidence with the R-10 hook-guard rule cited as the delivery-boundary enforcement mechanism in Roles and Permissions and Risks (APPROVAL-BOUNDARY).
